question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: What’s on your mind
new_queue.name: What’s been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Hidden drag
new_queue.name: What’s taking more effort than it should right now?

new_queue.label: Waiting on others
new_queue.name: What are you waiting on that could quietly stall you?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder visibility
new_queue.name: Who needs a clearer read on where things stand?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff call
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do this fortnight?

new_queue.label: Work that moves
new_queue.name: Which piece of work feels like the best use of your time right now?

new_queue.label: Early slippage
new_queue.name: Where do you see something slipping before it becomes a problem?

new_queue.label: Status handoff
new_queue.name: What would make your next update easier to give?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
